args.query: SELECT "Index" AS index_symbol, COUNT(*) AS total_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index" AS index_symbol, COUNT(*) AS total_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_NTTjQOgXwBZdeiwJLKh6DlsZ)
# cast numeric fields
for c in ['total_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices in this dataset: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite), NYA (NYSE Composite), GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite)
na = df[df['index_symbol'].isin(['IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE'])].copy()
res = na[na['up_days'] > na['down_days']].sort_values('index_symbol')[['index_symbol','up_days','down_days','total_days']]
out = res.to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_NTTjQOgXwBZdeiwJLKh6DlsZ)
# cast numeric fields
for c in ['total_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices in this dataset: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite), NYA (NYSE Composite), GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite)
na = df[df['index_symbol'].isin(['IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE'])].copy()
res = na[na['up_days'] > na['down_days']].sort_values('index_symbol')[['index_symbol','up_days','down_days','total_days']]
out = res.to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

result.preview: "In 2018, the North American indices in the dataset that had more up days than down days were:\n- GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite): 44 up days vs 41 down days\n- IXIC (NASDAQ Composite): 44 up days vs 31 down days"

args.answer:
In 2018, the North American indices in the dataset that had more up days than down days were:
- GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite): 44 up days vs 41 down days
- IXIC (NASDAQ Composite): 44 up days vs 31 down days
